frontmatter.title: Beyond Static
frontmatter.title_sub: Exploring Machine Learning for Adaptive Geometries in Expandable Structures
frontmatter.abstract: This study draws inspiration from grasshopper biomechanics and contemporary innovations, such as the Yaheetech Sideline Bench, to explore modularity and adaptability in design. Starting with foundational principles, it seamlessly integrates advanced techniques for a harmonious fusion guided by expansion and assembly strategies. The methodology refinement incorporates Machine Learning, specifically Self-Organizing Maps (SOM) by Teuvo Kohonen, diverging from conventional neural networks for a fresh perspective on design optimization.

# Inspiration
![Position of a grasshopper leg before take-off (Eroülu, 2008)](./figures/beyond-static-inspiration-1.png "Position of a grasshopper leg before take-off (Eroülu, 2008)") Position of a grasshopper leg before take-off (Eroülu, 2008). ![Anatomy of a grasshopper and leg mechanism (Eroglu, 2008)](./figures/beyond-static-inspiration-2.png "Anatomy of a grasshopper and leg mechanism (Eroglu, 2008)") Anatomy of a grasshopper and leg mechanism (Eroglu, 2008). ![Yaheetech 6 Seats Foldable Sideline Bench (Yaheetech, 2023)](./figures/beyond-static-inspiration-3.png "Yaheetech 6 Seats Foldable Sideline Bench (Yaheetech, 2023)") Yaheetech 6 Seats Foldable Sideline Bench (Yaheetech, 2023).
# Module & Geometry Rules ## Basic Rules
![Basic Rule: A](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-01.png "Basic Rule: A") ![Basic Rule: B](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-02.png "Basic Rule: B") ![Basic Rule: C](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-03.png "Basic Rule: C") ![Basic Rule: D](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-04.png "Basic Rule: D") ![Basic Rule: E](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-05.png "Basic Rule: E") ![Basic Rule: F](./figures/beyond-static-basic-rules-06.png "Basic Rule: F")

High resolution [here] ## Revised Rules (Adapted from the Basic) ![Revised Rules](./figures/beyond-static-revised-rules.png "Revised Rules") Revised Rules. The application of these principles in the assembly system, ensuring a thorough check of module assembly and a harmonious integration of designs with adaptability strategies. For the next rounds of SOM iterations, create 20 varied input models using a randomizer with a Gene Pool component, ensuring diversity in architectural elements for optimized design outcomes. # Aggregation: Assembly System import gif_aggre_1 from "./figures/beyond-static-aggre-1.gif"; import gif_aggre_1_low from "./figures/beyond-static-aggre-1-low.gif"; import gif_aggre_2 from "./figures/beyond-static-aggre-2.gif"; import gif_aggre_2_low from "./figures/beyond-static-aggre-2-low.gif";

Aggregation. # Machine Learning – SOM In the ML process with SOM, cycles are performed, reducing dimensions until colors are well-defined, as seen in the iteration steps in the image, with the cycle reaching a maximum at 37. By the 36th cycle, the results have already repeated.

Each circle represents the central value of each dimension, and 10 models are selected based on the RGB map as representatives. import gif_iter_axo from "./figures/beyond-static-iter-axo.gif"; import gif_iter_axo_low from "./figures/beyond-static-iter-axo-low.gif"; import gif_iter_top from "./figures/beyond-static-iter-top.gif"; import gif_iter_top_low from "./figures/beyond-static-iter-top-low.gif"; Axonometric.

frontmatter.title: Beyond Static
frontmatter.title_sub: Exploring Machine Learning for Adaptive Geometries in Expandable Structures
frontmatter.abstract: This study draws inspiration from grasshopper biomechanics and contemporary innovations, such as the Yaheetech Sideline Bench, to explore modularity and adaptability in design. Starting with foundational principles, it seamlessly integrates advanced techniques for a harmonious fusion guided by expansion and assembly strategies. The methodology refinement incorporates Machine Learning, specifically Self-Organizing Maps (SOM) by Teuvo Kohonen, diverging from conventional neural networks for a fresh perspective on design optimization.
